title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Five Elders, Okobore Town Villagers, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Master Nekomamushi's

dialogue.speaker: Five Elders
dialogue.text: Behind the Reverie....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Navigator Skills are crazy, man!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's someone that sailed with the pirate King for ya!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So... how long are we gonna wait in these ruins?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Till the master comes back with Marco the Phoenix!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Think Tribe GUARDIAMS

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's cause you guys' mugs are ugly enough to scare anyone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is Marco that much of a scaredy-cat?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, the villagers, idiot! Don't go in there, okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Tidbits about Marco the Phoenix

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Marco is the man once called the right hand of whitebeard, the captain of the formidable whitebeard pirates, who fell during the summit war two years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "After losing whitebeard - a man they called Father - his crew attempted to get revenge on the man who killed him, blackbeard. They failed.

dialogue.speaker: Okobore Town Villagers
dialogue.text: Beyond the cave behind that water- fall,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There's a kind little village, I hear.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not the place for a troop of warriors to go tramping about.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see. But the Master's face is way scarier than either of ours!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: only when he's angry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: His smile is cute.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: True.()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: GROOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOH

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Okay. Treatment's finished.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He should be alright now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But don't push it. My flame of restoration can't bring about huge changes in other beings.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: After the new-solving

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I've treated his injury,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He'll be able to fly around by tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Waah! Marco's Magic!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This is great, isn't it, TAMA?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I said tomorrow! Don't fly right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gruuh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Thank you, Marco!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Marco, my back's bothering me again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Marco! My poor old knees, I tell you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Marco! My little brother keeps bull- lying me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This village was built by pops.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Whitebeard, right? How did he...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They were too poor to pay the celestial offering, so the world government didn't let them join the alliance.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is true of most all unallied countries in general.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With Pirates and kidnappers running Amok, the country became a lawless place.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the country fell, and wretched orphans filled the streets.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Pops was among them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: at a very young age, he went out to sea. And even after he'd become a pirate,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He worried about this place.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Concealing his identity and status, he continued to send "Dirty" money and supplies here. His whole life.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course, his family was already... same went for his friends, by then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But this island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: was his homeland.

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 48 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
